notes: Long-lived session map; values own strings/maps, freed recursively on terminal close.

field: pane_id_aliases: HashMap<u32, PaneId> / public_pane_id_aliases: HashMap<String, PaneId>
notes: String keys duped into gpa; freed when alias removed (remove_alias_shadowed_by_new_pane).
Workspace.deinit frees tabs, panes, cached git metadata recursively.
Ownership transfer: state hands buffer to App loop; consumer frees, then sets null.
Small mutable strings; free old value on assignment (no Rust drop to do it).
Persisted UI state; keys duped from snapshot load.
Modal dialog state with input Strings and Vec<candidate> lists; freed when modal closes.

field: view: ViewState (workspace_card_areas, tab_hit_areas, pane_infos, split_borders Vecs)
notes: Rebuilt every compute_view(); never outlives a frame. Zig: build into per-frame arena, reset after render.
Values contain message Strings.

field: cjk_ime_agents / integration_recommendations / agent_manifest_summaries / integration_install_messages / plugin_command_logs: Vec<...>
notes: Config/status caches replaced wholesale; free old Vec + element strings on refresh.
Plugin records own path/name strings.
Must be removed in same mutation as pane close or dangles (UAF-risk pairing).
PaneGraphicsLayer.data: Vec<u8> is large image payload; free eagerly, not at session end.
Owner token strings.
Session-modal pane state.
Handoff queue from pure state to runtime layer; ids are values, Vec reused (clearRetainingCapacity).
Image bytes, potentially MBs; replace = free old + dupe new.
Identity strings live as long as the workspace.
Zig: []u8 path dup.
Refresh replaces whole value; free old first.
Token strings duped per report.
Value-only map; numbers never reused so entries persist past pane close.
Tab.deinit frees layout tree + panes map.
Rust Box tree -> Zig *Node from gpa or a small node pool; recursive free on tab close and on pane removal rebalance.
PaneState is POD (TerminalId + bool); map storage only.

who_frees: App owns queue; Tab holds non-owning handle
notes: Zig: one App-owned MPSC queue; Tab stores *EventQueue, no refcount. Queue must outlive all tabs (App deinit order).
Shared wakeup primitives -> plain *RenderSignal owned by App; threads must be joined before App.deinit (replaces Arc keep-alive).
No heap data; stays a plain struct.

field: cwd: PathBuf; terminal_title / manual_label / agent_name: Option<String>
notes: set_terminal_title replaces; Zig setter must free previous title.
Keys are source names; values own display strings.

field: metadata_tokens + hook_report_sequences / metadata_report_sequences: HashMap<String, u64>; metadata_token_sequence_sources: HashSet<String>
notes: Per-source sequence tracking; keys duped once per source.
stale sessions hold Vec of session refs with strings; sweep frees entries.
Resume plan is take()-style ownership transfer to the spawn path; taker frees.
Duped argv for respawn/snapshot.
Runtime removal must go through shutdown() (joins IO actor) before free; never free while reader thread live.

rust_ownership: Arc (shared with detect task + IO callback)
who_frees: last dropper (refcounted) or PaneRuntime.shutdown after task join
notes: ghostty Terminal is FFI (ghostty_terminal_new/free). Recommended: single owner in PaneRuntime; shutdown() aborts+joins detect task and IO actor before ghostty_terminal_free. Top UAF risk.
Actor owns PTY master fd (OwnedFd unix / Box<dyn MasterPty> windows) and writer; fd closed only after reader+writer threads exit.

field: child_pid / kitty_keyboard_flags / detection_content_seq / full_lifecycle_authority_active / child_wait_completed: Arc<Atomic*>
notes: Collapse the 5 atomics into one heap PaneShared struct; atomics need no refcount once lifetime is join-bounded.
std.Thread.Mutex + owned []u8 path; writer (OSC7 callback) frees old value under lock.
take()-under-lock ownership transfer.
Condvar/futex-based signal; freed after detect task join.
Zig: store std.Thread + cancellation flag; join before freeing PaneShared.
Opaque C handle; Zig side never frees its internals directly.
FFI userdata pointer into this allocation: must be a separate heap allocation (not inline in a movable struct) and outlive the raw handle. UAF risk if struct is moved/copied.
Interior mutability -> Zig mutex + map, no change in ownership.

zig_allocator: single-owner queues owned by actor; handle holds pointers
who_frees: actor thread frees queues on exit after all senders detach
notes: Zig: bounded MPSC ring (1024 Bytes msgs) owned by actor; handle validity tied to PaneRuntime lifetime (join before free).
Reader thread owns read buffer (fixed 64KiB scratch, pool or static per-thread); Bytes payloads gpa-owned, freed by consumer (ghostty write path).

zig_allocator: fd is kernel resource; child in gpa
notes: Zig: posix.fd_t + child-process handle struct; preserve_for_handoff intentionally leaks fd to successor process.
Per-client override; Box -> *LiveKeybindConfig from gpa.
Stateful partial-escape buffer; grows with input, freed with connection.
Baseline frame (Vec<CellData> incl. per-cell symbol Strings); large; replaced per resize.
Per-client Kitty state mirror.
Owns both memory and on-disk temp files.

rust_ownership: owned handle; queue shared with writer thread
who_frees: writer thread on exit; connection close signals + joins
notes: ClientWriterQueue is Mutex+Condvar shared between server loop and writer thread; Zig: heap queue freed by whichever side detaches last, or (simpler) join writer thread on close then free. UAF risk if server frees while writer mid-send.
Root owner; deinit order: signal clients -> join writer threads -> shutdown runtimes -> free state.
Socket file must be unlinked on clean shutdown.
String keys are terminal id strings.

who_frees: server shutdown after client threads join
notes: should_quit -> plain static/heap atomic; client threads must not outlive server.

zig_allocator: single App-owned queues (gpa nodes per msg)
notes: AppEvent payloads (Strings, session refs, HashMaps in HookMetadataReported) are allocated by producer, freed by App loop after handling: strict produce-alloc/consume-free rule.

zig_allocator: gpa ring, single owner App, mutex-guarded
notes: MAX_EVENTS=512 bounded ring; API threads access via *EventHub, must stop before App.deinit.
Path-keyed caches; keys duped.

who_frees: join on next save or deinit; children reaped
notes: Snapshot bytes for save thread must be an owned copy (arena cloned then handed to thread which frees).

who_frees: handle deinit: set running=false, join, free
notes: Rust Drop -> explicit deinit; join before freeing running flag.

field: Input.data / ClipboardImage.data: Vec<u8>; AttachTerminal.terminal_id: String; InputEvents: Vec<...>
notes: Decode each frame into a per-message arena; handlers must dupe into gpa anything that outlives dispatch (e.g. clipboard staging). Never store arena pointers in state.

field: cells: Vec<CellData> (symbol String each), hyperlinks: Vec<String>
notes: Built, serialized, discarded; classic per-frame arena. ClientRenderState baseline copy is the exception: duped into gpa.

field: workspaces: Vec<WorkspaceSnapshot> -> tabs/panes maps, PaneHistorySnapshot.ansi: String, LayoutSnapshot Box tree
who_frees: arena reset after write / after restore copies out
notes: Save: build snapshot in arena, serialize, reset. Load: parse in arena, materialize AppState into gpa, reset. ansi history strings can be MBs.
Pure value struct; stays POD in Zig.

field: static MANIFEST_CACHE: OnceLock<RwLock<ManifestCache>>; LoadedManifest{manifest, compiled_rules, warnings}
who_frees: reload swaps: old generation freed after last reader drops
notes: Rules/regex/strings owned by cache generation. Zig: rwlock + generation pointer; reload builds new gen in gpa, frees old after write-lock swap (readers hold lock across whole evaluation - no lock-free readers, so free-under-swap is safe).

field: id/aliases/rules Vec<String>, nested gate Vecs, compiled regex
notes: Regex compilation allocates; tie compiled artifacts to the same generation lifetime.

who_frees: arena reset after API response encoded
notes: Diagnostic output only; never stored.
Cached in AppState.agent_manifest_update_status.

field: nested config structs, Strings, Vec<String> bindings (pattern row: also ThemeConfig, SoundConfig, ToastConfig, AgentsSidebarConfig, SpacesSidebarConfig, WorktreesConfig, ExperimentalConfig)
who_frees: old config arena freed after new one swapped in
notes: Config is read-mostly and reloaded wholesale (request_reload_config): load whole file into one arena, swap root pointer, destroy previous arena. No per-field frees.
Static local cache is deliberate process-lifetime state; register in leak-check skip list.
Envelope JSON strings owned by hub; subscribers get copies serialized per-request into request arena.
